summary: Frontend-only iteration 3 testing (999 Taxi). All new features verified: navbar logo (/logo-999.png loaded, naturalWidth=150), hero 3D canvas renders, ScrollProgress bar scales on scroll (0 -> 696px width), 6 driver-advantages cards + telegram CTA (https://t.me/t_boxodir), 6 testimonial cards, OfficeLocation with address/hours/phone/directions/telegram/map iframe wrapper. Section IDs #tizim, #fikrlar, #manzil present. Section numbering 01-11 confirmed in order (BIZ HAQIMIZDA, XIZMATLAR, AFZALLIKLAR, TIZIM AFZALLIKLARI, JARAYON, TALABLAR, ISHONCH, FIKRLAR, OFIS MANZILI, SAVOL-JAVOB, ALOQA). Old testimonials-placeholder removed. Regression: 6 services, 4 process steps, 4 trust blocks, 6 FAQ items (expand works). Lead form flow works end-to-end: fill name+phone → submit → window.open called with t.me URL containing form data → 'Rahmat!' success shown → reset returns to form. Mobile 390x844: no horizontal overflow, sticky CTA visible (testid mobile-sticky-cta). No page/console errors, no runtime overlay, no drei customDepthMaterial crash.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: The request checklist expected data-testid 'mobile-cta' but implementation uses 'mobile-sticky-cta' — not a bug, just naming mismatch to note.
office-phone/office-address/office-hours are wrapper divs without href; the tel: link is on the inner <a>. Consider adding data-testid to inner anchor if href-level testing is needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page fully functional. Testids of note: brand-logo (img), hero-3d-canvas, scroll-progress-bar, advantage-card-0..5, advantages-cta-telegram, testimonial-card-0..5, office-address/hours/phone/directions-cta/telegram-cta/map (map is wrapper div containing iframe), leadform-name/phone/submit/success/reset, mobile-sticky-cta (not mobile-cta).
